emotional_tone: Precise, brutalist, command-center. It feels like an elite machine for extracting digital assets, rather than a generic SaaS or sketchy download site.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Control Room Grid. High density, brutalist contrast, visible structure. Expose the skeleton of the layout.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Hard corners (rounded-none). 2px solid borders (#0A0A0A). Use stark drop shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]). No soft shadows.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous inner padding for main layout cells (p-8, p-12) but dense data tables/history lists.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment. Everything must align to the grid mathematically.

components.buttons: Square edges. Primary CTA: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#001D6E]. Secondary/Cancel: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white. Destructive: bg-[#FF2A00] text-white. Always define focus and hover states.
components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002FA7] font-mono h-14 px-4 rounded-none. Placeholder text should be high-contrast muted.
components.cards: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] p-6 rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0A0A0A].
components.progress_bar: h-4 rounded-none bg-[#E5E5E5] overflow-hidden border-2 border-[#0A0A0A]. Fill is #002FA7 with stark transition.
components.toast: Use Sonner. Override classes to match brutalist style: border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] font-mono bg-white text-[#0A0A0A].
components.tabs: Hard-edged. Active tab: border-b-4 border-[#002FA7] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold. Inactive: border-b-2 border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#737373].

visual_enhancers.borders: Visible grid structure. Use border-r-2 border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A] for lists and history items to feel like a terminal ledger.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: High-contrast shifts. Interactive items must invert colors or heavily darken on hover.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react with sharp/regular weight. No rounded soft icons.

media.strategy: Minimalist and raw. Visuals should either be the media being downloaded or stark abstract technological grids.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., data-testid='download-submit-button', data-testid='url-input-field', data-testid='format-select-dropdown', data-testid='bulk-textarea').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The frontend uses JavaScript (.js/.jsx files). DO NOT use .tsx or TypeScript in your implementation.
Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Override standard Shadcn variables to remove radiuses (set radius to 0 in tailwind base) and use stark #0A0A0A borders.
Include Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Mono for all body/interface text. Import these from Google Fonts/Fontshare.

Build the core required features: Single URL download input, Bulk download tab (textarea), Fetch Info button (revealing title/duration/thumbnail), Format selection (dropdown), Live progress bars, and a History queue.
The history queue should visually look like a dense data table or command-line log with thumbnails. Use the provided mock thumbnails in 'media.images' for initial mock data instead of placeholders.
For interactions, favor raw HTML+Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn heavily customized (stripped of soft shadows, adding thick borders) for dropdowns and toasts.
Ensure the UI uses hard shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]) on interactive cards and buttons to match the brutalist aesthetic.
Run 'yarn add @phosphor-icons/react sonner' for icons and toast notifications.
